# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

image: docker:latest

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  DOCKER_IMAGE_NAME: $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME
  CI_DEBUG_TRACE: "true"

before_script:
  - echo "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin registry.gitlab.com

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - ./custom-build-script.sh
  only:
    - main

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - ./custom-test-script.sh
  only:
    - main

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - ./custom-deploy-script.sh
  only:
    - main
